transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-06]
[00:00] You: Engineering sprint planning for sprint 24. Let's go through each track.
[00:30] Speaker 1: Backend track: I'll finish the payments API integration by July 10th. I also need to fix the rate limiter bug — I'll get that done by July 8th.
[01:15] Speaker 2: Frontend track: I'll complete the dashboard redesign by July 13th. Speaker 3, I'll need your design review on the new components by July 9th so I can incorporate feedback.
[02:00] Speaker 3: I'll review Speaker 2's dashboard components and send feedback by July 9th. I'll also finalize the mobile design tokens — I can have those ready by July 11th.
[02:45] Speaker 4: Platform track: I'll set up the staging Kubernetes cluster by July 7th. I'll also update the CI/CD pipeline to run integration tests on every PR — I'll have that configured by July 10th.
[03:30] You: Good. We also need to address the accessibility audit findings. Speaker 1, can you fix the keyboard navigation issues?
[03:50] Speaker 1: I'll fix the keyboard navigation issues in the settings panel by July 14th.
[04:15] You: And the contrast ratio failures — Speaker 2?
[04:30] Speaker 2: I'll fix the color contrast issues across the main nav by July 14th.
[04:55] Speaker 3: I'll update the design system documentation to include accessibility guidelines. I'll have that done by July 15th.
[05:20] You: Great. Speaker 4, can you set up automated accessibility testing in CI?
[05:35] Speaker 4: I'll integrate axe-core into the CI pipeline by July 15th.
[06:00] You: The sprint review is July 24th. Let's make sure everything is demo-ready by July 22nd.

I'll complete the dashboard redesign by July 13th.

decisions: Sprint review is July 24th; all work must be demo-ready by July 22nd
